label: Aviludo April
rootCause: On v26 single-run extract, Pass C copies gross_unit_price into line_total_net for every row where qty > 1. Extracted total equals unit_price instead of VALOR (qty × unit_price). All five multi-qty rows fail identically; four single-qty rows are correct because unit_price equals line total. Refinement reextract (2026-06-11, same PNG fixture) achieved €0 — proving GT is reachable and this is real extraction variance, not GT mismatch.

mechanism.binderImpact: Binder preserves wrong line_total_net; no Rule B/E trigger when total intentionally equals unit_price

rankedContributors.product: Filete de Anchovas Alconfrisa Lt 495 g
Atum Óleo Bolsa Nau Catrineta 1 Kg

beforeC33_postAudit.note: Same failure mode on April PNG fixture

smallestFixCategory.recommendation: Add Aviludo April BAD/GOOD examples: when qty > 1, line_total_net must come from VALOR column (e.g. Ovo 6 × 10,19 = 61,14) — BAD if line_total_net equals gross_unit_price (10,19). Complements v26 Chocolate row-isolation rule (price bleed) with total-column rule.
